---
title: "Dot motion modelling - overview"
---

This page functions as a home base for progress updates on the response bias modelling
for our dot motion project.

## Pages
- [27/2: Circular modelling](responsebias_circularmodel.qmd)
- [6/3: Mixture modelling](responsebias_mixturemodel.qmd)
- [12/3: Strategy modelling](responsebias_mixturemodel_revised.qmd)
